title: Lock File Read and Write Flow
interaction_flow_read: Locker → Locker::getLockData(): array  [caches in lockDataCache; reads JsonFile if null]
Locker → JsonFile::read(): array  [parses composer.lock JSON from disk]
Locker: foreach lockData['aliases'] → new CompleteAliasPackage + LockArrayRepository::addPackage(alias)
Installer → Locker::isFresh(): bool  [compares contentHash with lock['content-hash']]
Installer → Locker::getMissingRequirementInfo(RootPackageInterface, bool): array  [validates required packages exist in locked repo]
Installer → Locker::getPlatformRequirements(bool $withDevReqs): Link[]  [loads platform/platform-dev from lock data]
Installer: new LocalRepoTransaction(lockedRepository, localRepo)  [diff lock vs installed]
Installer: execute install/update/uninstall operations via InstallationManager
interaction_flow_write: Installer::doUpdate() — entry point for update/resolve+write-lock
Installer → Solver::solve($request, $platformRequirementFilter): LockTransaction
Installer → Installer::extractDevPackages(LockTransaction, ...): int  [separates dev from non-dev in transaction]
Installer → Installer::extractPlatformRequirements($package->getRequires()): array  [$platformReqs]
Installer → Installer::extractPlatformRequirements($package->getDevRequires()): array  [$platformDevReqs]
Installer → LockTransaction::getNewLockPackages(false, $updateMirrors): PackageInterface[]  [prod packages]
Installer → LockTransaction::getNewLockPackages(true, $updateMirrors): PackageInterface[]  [dev packages]
Installer → LockTransaction::getAliases($aliases): array
Installer → Locker::setLockData(packages, devPackages, platformReqs, platformDevReqs, aliases, minimumStability, stabilityFlags, preferStable, preferLowest, platformOverrides, bool $write): bool
Locker → Locker::lockPackages(PackageInterface[] $packages): array  [serialize to lock format]
Locker::lockPackages: foreach package → ArrayDumper::dump($package): array
Locker::lockPackages: skip AliasPackage instances
Locker::lockPackages: for dev packages with git source → Locker::getPackageTime($package)  [gets commit timestamp via ProcessExecutor]
Locker::lockPackages: unset version_normalized, installation-source; sort by name+version
Locker: assembles $lock = {content-hash, packages, packages-dev, aliases, minimum-stability, stability-flags, prefer-stable, prefer-lowest, platform, platform-dev, plugin-api-version}
Locker → Locker::fixupJsonDataType($lock): array  [empty arrays → stdClass for JSON objects; ksort stability-flags]
Locker → Locker::isLocked(): bool  [check if existing lock present]
Locker: if changed AND $write==true → JsonFile::write($lock)  [writes composer.lock to disk]; lockDataCache=null
Locker: if changed AND $write==false → virtualFileWritten=true; lockDataCache = JsonFile::parseJson(encode($lock))  [dry-run / executeOperations=false]
Locker returns bool $updatedLock to Installer
Installer: if $updatedLock && writeLock && executeOperations → io->writeError('Writing lock file')
key_relationships: Locker composes JsonFile (lock file I/O), ArrayLoader (deserialize), ArrayDumper (serialize), InstallationManager
Locker creates LockArrayRepository instances in getLockedRepository()
FilesystemRepository::initialize() reads JsonFile and uses ArrayLoader to populate packages
FilesystemRepository::write() uses ArrayDumper and InstallationManager to serialize packages

key_methods: setLockData(array $packages, ?array $devPackages, array $platformReqs, array $platformDevReqs, array $aliases, string $minimumStability, array $stabilityFlags, bool $preferStable, bool $preferLowest, array $platformOverrides, bool $write=true): bool
write(bool $devMode, InstallationManager)  [ArrayDumper::dump, file->write, optionally generates installed.php]

key_lock_methods: run(): int  [main entry; branches to doUpdate or doInstall]
doUpdate(...): int  [resolves deps, writes lock via locker->setLockData]

important_notes: LockArrayRepository is a marker subclass — all real logic lives in ArrayRepository and CanonicalPackagesTrait
Locker caches lock data in $lockDataCache; cleared on every JsonFile::write()
dry-run / executeOperations=false: setLockData stores in lockDataCache without writing to disk (virtualFileWritten=true)
writeLock comes from config 'lock' key (can be disabled); if disabled, lock file is never written
Platform requirements (platform / platform-dev) come from root package's requires filtered by PlatformRepository::isPlatformPackage
lockPackages() sorts by name+version for deterministic output; strips version_normalized and installation-source fields
content-hash = md5 of relevant composer.json keys (name, version, require, require-dev, conflict, replace, provide, minimum-stability, prefer-stable, repositories, extra, config.platform)
InstalledFilesystemRepository::write() also generates installed.php and reloads InstalledVersions static state
AliasPackages are skipped in lockPackages() but added back as CompleteAliasPackage during getLockedRepository()
